useNodePositions coverage 11→44 (was 0.80 ratio, lowest unaudited storage helper): added 33 tests for the localStorage persistence layer. clearPositions now also tested for combo-storage cleanup (axon_combos_${topicId} removed alongside positions). LRU node eviction (MAX_POSITIONS=500, oldest 5 dropped after 505 inserts, update-existing-node moves to end via Map insertion-order delete+set trick). LRU topic eviction (MAX_TOPICS=50, oldest dropped, evicted topic's combo entry also dropped, touch-existing keeps topic from eviction, TOPIC_INDEX_KEY=axon_node_pos_index). memoryCache hot path (rapid drag-end persists through cache, clearPositions invalidates cache, switching topics rebuilds from storage). loadCombos/saveCombos (round-trip, empty-array → removeItem cleanup, validates each entry filters invalid, [] on bad JSON, isolated per topic, axon_combos_ prefix, touches topic index). Grid toggle persistence (loadGridEnabled false default, round-trip true/false explicit '0' value, only '1' reads as true any-other false, axon_grid_enabled key not topic-scoped). Source-level invariants (4 storage prefix constants pinned, MAX_POSITIONS=500, MAX_TOPICS=50, Number.isFinite rejects Infinity/NaN, ≥7 try/catch wrappers for Safari private-mode safety, memoryCache single-active-topic pattern, LRU via Map delete+set trick). Result: 74 files / 3098 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 3098/3098 assertions pass; useNodePositions LRU eviction (per-node + per-topic) + Grid toggle + Combo persistence pinned at the storage-key level
